mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts ( user_no, title, category, content, image_path, image_original_name, created_at ) VALUES ( (SELECT user_no FROM users WHERE username = #{username}), #{post.title}, #{post.category}, #{post.content}, #{post.imagePath}, #{post.imageOriginalName}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, u.nickname AS writerNickname, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_likes WHERE post_no = p.post_no) AS likeCount FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_no = u.user_no WHERE p.status = 'Y' ORDER BY p.post_no DESC LIMIT 9

SELECT p.*, u.nickname AS writerNickname, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_likes WHERE post_no = p.post_no) AS likeCount FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_no = u.user_no WHERE p.status = 'Y' AND p.post_no < #{lastPostNo} ORDER BY p.post_no DESC LIMIT #{size}
SELECT p.*, u.nickname AS writerNickname FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_no = u.user_no WHERE p.status = 'Y' AND LOWER(u.nickname) = 'root' ORDER BY p.post_no DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_no = u.user_no WHERE p.status = 'Y' AND LOWER(u.nickname) = 'root'

SELECT p.*, u.nickname AS writerNickname, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_likes WHERE post_no = p.post_no) AS likeCount FROM posts p INNER JOIN users u ON p.user_no = u.user_no WHERE p.post_no = #{postNo} AND p.status = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_likes (post_no, user_no) VALUES (#{postNo}, (SELECT user_no FROM users WHERE username = #{username}))
